description: Measure the internal AP and transverse tracheal diameters at the aortic arch level on the chest CT to calculate the Tracheal Index (transverse/AP ratio) and classify the tracheal shape. Save the measurement markup to ~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/trachea_measurements.mrk.json and the report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/trachea_report.json with the following fields: ap_diameter_mm, transverse_diameter_mm, tracheal_index, classification, and slice_number.

metadata.clinical_context: Saber-sheath trachea (TI < 0.67) is a specific CT finding in COPD, seen in approximately 40% of severe COPD patients.
